title: ardisia dodgei
intro: Ardisia dodgei, also known as the 'Red Baneberry', is a species of flowering plant in the family Myrsinaceae, native to the southeastern United States. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Ardisia dodgei include its potential to reduce fever, alleviate digestive issues, and support immune function. Herbal preparations of the plant typically involve drying and crushing the roots or leaves, which can be made into teas, tinctures, or infusions for medicinal use.
